info.title: TOEFL Certificate Verification API
info.description: API untuk sistem verifikasi sertifikat TOEFL berbasis blockchain. Mengelola autentikasi, layanan tes, penjadwalan, pendaftaran peserta, penilaian, dan verifikasi sertifikat melalui IPFS dan Ethereum smart contract.

description.example: Test of English as a Foreign Language
Test of English as a Foreign Language

get.summary: Check API and Services Health Status
get.description: Mengecek kesehatan koneksi ke database, Pinata (IPFS), dan Cloudinary.

503.description: Satu atau lebih layanan terdegradasi / terputus

get.description: Memverifikasi keaslian sertifikat TOEFL berdasarkan CID dari IPFS.
Mengambil riwayat aktivitas pendaftaran tes dari peserta yang sedang login.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: The ID of the service to update

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: The ID of the service to delete

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all schedules, including soft-deleted ones if requested. Requires admin role.

post.description: Create a new schedule for a given service. Requires admin role.

parameters.name: serviceId
parameters.description: The service ID to associate the schedule with

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of active schedules within the next 7 days. No authentication required.

patch.description: Update an existing schedule by its ID. Requires admin role.

parameters.name: scheduleId
parameters.description: The ID of the schedule to update

patch.description: Soft delete a schedule by its ID. The schedule is marked as deleted but not permanently removed. Requires admin role.

parameters.name: scheduleId
parameters.description: The ID of the schedule to soft delete

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of all enrollments. Accessible by admin only.
Retrieve a paginated list of participants enrolled in a specific schedule. Accessible by admin only.

post.description: Register the authenticated peserta (participant) for a specific test schedule. Requires a payment proof image upload.

parameters.name: scheduleId
parameters.description: The ID of the schedule to register for

birthDate.description: Date of birth of the participant

patch.description: Approve or reject a pending enrollment request. Accessible by admin only.

patch.summary: Submit test score for a participant
patch.description: Submit the test score for a specific participant in an enrollment. Accessible by admin only.
Confirm that the test score has been successfully stored on the blockchain. Accessible by admin only.

post.description: Register a new user account with wallet address and profile details.
Authenticate a user by wallet address. Returns a JWT token if the user is already registered, or a response indicating registration is needed.

get.description: Retrieve the profile of the currently authenticated user.
